channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:

item.title: Bus shelter in High St Beckenham southbound Lane - illuminated display panel detached and leaning out about 75mm at the top., 21st June
item.description:
Bus shelter in High St Beckenham southbound Lane - illuminated display panel detached and leaning out about 75mm at the top. Still illuminated and wires not obvious, but it needs fairly prompt repair. Seen about 11.30pm Sat 20/6/26
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly I’m tipping, 21st June
item.description:
Between Holbeach road and nelgarde road next to the flats is bedmates tables cubicle been there from Wednesday people are trying to set it a light I was walking pass that way on 20/6/2026 it needs to be removed soon as possible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Nelgarde Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop K, northbound, fronting Sainsbury's, High St, Penge - missing timetables for routes 194, 227 and 358., 21st June
item.description:
Bus stop K, northbound, fronting Sainsbury's, High St, Penge - missing timetables for routes 194, 227 and 358. The N3 timetable is present

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree branch on footway, Shortlands Rd, Shortlands adjoining the bus shelter and about 12 metres N of the junction with The Glen., 21st June
item.description:
Large tree branch on footway, Shortlands Rd, Shortlands adjoining the bus shelter and about 12 metres N of the junction with The Glen. It is about 4m long x 3m wide with a main 7.5cm branch but otherwise spindly branches. Seen at 11.40pm Sat 20/6/26. It was not there at about 3.30pm. It looks ripped off as it does not have a saw cut end. I can't see where it might have broken from, but I saw it at night time. It was extending just over a metre into the carriageway. I have done my best, with mobility limitations and pain, to move it out of the carriageway and also leave about 0.75m of pavement free to walk on. That will not be enough for mobility scooters, double pushchairs etc. Also it will be a hazard to blind and partially-sighted people.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human or dog faeces at staircase, 20th June
item.description:
This is from today with extreme bio hazardous smell at the corner of scriven court to no.71 side at mid landing please act on this horrendous incident.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haggerston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A teenager has been charged with murder after a 15-year-old boy was stabbed to death in east London. Police were called at about 19:15 BST on Monday to reports of a "large gathering, disorder and sightings of individuals in possession of machetes in Towpath Walk" in Hackney Wick. Officers and paramedics found Brayan David Saldarriaga, from Haringey, north London, with stab wounds in nearby Poplar Close, where he was pronounced dead. A 16-year-old, who cannot be named because of his age, was also charged with possession of a bladed article. He will appear at Thames Magistrates' Court on Saturday. Brayan's next-of-kin are being supported by specialist officers, the Metropolitan Police said. Anyone with information about the incident is asked to contact the force., 20th June
item.description:
Residence do not feel safe with this incident that occurred of a 15 year old boy being stabbed. Local residents would like Hackney Council and the metropolitan police to stick up CCTV for future incidents. To make residence feel safe.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reading Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In the road opposite 21/23 agar grove, 20th June
item.description:
This man hole cover rocks and is very noisy. It has been reported previously and not been fixed. It has been like this for around four months. This is a road that is busy day and night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Agar Grove, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Road, Hackney, London

item.title: A Broken Tree Post and Protective Cage is Damaging a Young Tree., 20th June
item.description:
A Broken Tree Post and Protective Cage is Damaging a Young Tree. It needs replaced/repaired as the tree is still vulnerable. I have removed the cage as it was pushing the tree over by about 20 degrees and left it by the side.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenworthy Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike in the river Quaggy by wooden bridge/platform, 20th June
item.description:
Bike in the water of river Quaggy with the battery getting wet, might be contaminating in chinbrook meadows by the wooden bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadow Lane, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timber bollard displaced, 20th June
item.description:
Another timber bollard has been knocked over by a vehicle all the paving around has been broken. This keeps happening and Greenwich council refuse to give an answer as to why this stretch of road ( past a school ) is not a 20 mph zone

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet
